title: coleus koulikoroensis
intro: Coleus koulikoroensis is a plant species in the Lamiaceae family, commonly known as the West African Coleus or Coleus from Mali. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Coleus koulikoroensis include its potential to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of Coleus koulikoroensis can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and decoctions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
